label: ngsTracts CO/NCO/DCO/MOSAIC classifier
notes: Adapter pair: import_tract_classifications + normalize_tract_classifications. STEP_TRC_01 output.

label: per-(chrom × dyad) CO/DCO/NCO counts
notes: Karyotype-stratified rows (homA/het/homB) drive the intrachromosomal-effect view.

label: per-(tested chrom × local inversion) covariate matrix
notes: Filtered subset of inversion_candidates.v1; covariate for interchromosomal page.

label: per-(chrom × interval_a × interval_b) c-coincidence
notes: C = r_ab / (r_a · r_b). Derives c when producer omits it; flags c > neg_interference_threshold.

label: per-candidate sex-specific CO ideogram + telomere curve
notes: Per-inversion-candidate JSON; cross-atlas consumer = genome-atlas page3 CO-density sub-track.

label: per-candidate NCO/GC tract ideogram + telomere curve
notes: Sister track to crossover_track; ngsTracts STEP_TRC_01 output keyed per candidate.

label: PRDM9 PWM from CO ±2kb hotspots
notes: Optional. MEME / STREME wrapper. Page hides logo card when pwm null.

label: NCO enrichment inside vs outside inversion (cohort, MOSAIC_SHORT × inside-inv)
notes: CHAIN — PROMOTED: tract_classifications_v1 → crosstab → Fisher exact (two-sided + one-sided-greater). Runner: runners.compute_nco_enrichment.compute. v1 is cohort-level; per-candidate fan-out is v2.

label: CO_rate(het) vs CO_rate(non-het) per chromosome (Welch's t)
notes: CHAIN — PROMOTED: chromosome_meiosis_events_v1 (karyo-stratified) → per-dyad CO_per_mb split by het vs non-het → Welch's t per chrom (hand-rolled t-CDF via incomplete beta) + rate_ratio < flag_threshold flag. Runner: runners.compute_intrachromosomal_co.compute.

label: HEADLINE: focal inversion karyotype → meiosis on OTHER chromosomes
notes: CHAIN — PROMOTED: chromosome_meiosis_events_v1 + family_aware_permutation_design_v1 (+ optional local_inv_controls_v1) → per-parent CO_per_mb split by karyotype → Welch's t + family-aware permutation null (shuffle karyotype labels within permutation_block via mulberry32 PRNG when seeded) + BH + Bonferroni across off-focal chrom tests. Runner: runners.compute_interchromosomal_effect.compute.

label: Per-candidate NCO enrichment (Fisher per inversion + BH across the set)
notes: CHAIN — v2 fan-out of nco_inside_vs_outside_inversion. tract_classifications_v1 + inversion_candidates.v1 → per-candidate crosstab → Fisher exact → BH/Bonferroni across the candidate set. Cross-atlas read from inversion-atlas (inversion_candidates.v1). Runner: runners.compute_nco_per_candidate.compute.
